untranslatable_reason: This signal defines a meta-rule about positional advantage (trader edge vs competitors, product knowledge, speed, structural advantage, capital flexibility) that cannot be expressed as quantitative technical indicator conditions. The rule requires measurement of relative competitive advantage dimensions, participant classification, and edge quality assessments that are qualitative/subjective and not available in the allowed technical indicator set. No technical indicators can measure: comparative advantage vs participant classes, actionable opportunity translation, edge neutralization timing, or advantage type/magnitude.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_2 is a regime-filtering rule from Jack Schwager emphasizing when NOT to trade rather than specific entry/exit signals. It requires pre-trade qualitative analysis of trader positioning and market structure. This belongs in pre-trade risk management (position sizing cap at 35% per identified edge) rather than backtestable indicator logic. Suggest implementing as manual gate or as separate position-sizing overlay applied to other generated signals.
